name: Indian Industrial Steel Consumers (Aggregate)
description: Aggregate representation of Indian auto, construction, and manufacturing sectors that consume steel as input. Highly price-sensitive with limited switching options.
objectives: Secure stable steel supply at competitive prices to maintain production schedules
Minimize input cost volatility to preserve profit margins in competitive sectors
Diversify supplier base to reduce dependency on domestic oligopoly
Maintain quality standards while optimizing procurement costs
constraints: Long-term contracts with auto OEMs limit ability to pass through cost increases
Import tariffs and logistics costs make international sourcing uncompetitive
Quality certification requirements limit approved supplier pool
Working capital constraints prevent large-scale stockpiling strategies
